name: Orqa d.o.o.
china_free_note: One radio module found to contain Chinese-manufactured component during 2025 DoD review — manufacturing moved in-house since then. All current production claimed China-free.

corporate_history.event: Founded in Osijek, Croatia by Kovačević, Jelušić, Matijević
FPV.One Pilot goggles released — marketed as best-in-class FPV goggles
Acquired ImmersionRC (Switzerland) — created EU drone electronics powerhouse
FPV goggles bricked by third-party software incident (license/ransomware dispute)
$5.8M seed from Lightspeed Venture Partners (US), Radius Capital (US), Decisive Point (US), Day One Capital (Hungary)
DoD purchases discovered one Chinese-sourced radio module — purchases halted, module moved in-house
FPV MRM-2 Interceptor officially presented at Zagreb military parade. Croatian Army orders €10M of configured drones
Baykar partnership announced — Orqa FPV drones to be carried by Bayraktar TB2
Lendurai (Estonia) partnership — autonomy software for next-gen FPV drones. 2-day operator training vs 1 month typical
Production capacity scaled to 280,000 drones/year at Osijek facility
€12.7M Series A led by Expeditions fund. Includes Lightspeed, Taiwania Capital, Radius Capital, AYMO Ventures (Croatia)

drones.note: NDAA-compliant, EW-resilient combat FPV. In service with Croatian Armed Forces.

electronics.note: OLED FPV goggles, sold in 50+ countries
Manufactured in-house — last Chinese component removed when motor production moved internal
Ghost RC link inherited from ImmersionRC acquisition. Proprietary protocol.
Working on proprietary digital FPV system (no confirmed release timeline)

manufacturing.vertical_integration: Full — designs and manufactures goggles, FCs, motors, PCBs, cameras, radios, mechanical parts in-house or with EU partners
manufacturing.partner_manufacturing: FPV manufacturing licensing partnership with unnamed Western European NATO country
manufacturing.us_expansion: US manufacturing planned with Series A funds — Kovačević says US is 'front and center'
manufacturing.localization_model: Technology transfer to partner countries for sovereign drone manufacturing capability

defense_customers.status: halted 2025 (Chinese module found), likely resumed after in-house fix

partnerships.detail: Orqa FPV drones to be carried/deployed by Bayraktar TB2
AI autonomy software — next-gen autonomous FPV drones, 2-day operator training
Swiss FPV electronics company. Ghost RC link, analog VTX products.

strategic_significance.summary: Orqa is the most important allied FPV drone manufacturer globally. Only company in the Western hemisphere with full vertical integration — all drone building blocks manufactured in-house without Chinese components.
strategic_significance.ndaa_relevance: NDAA-compliant, China-free supply chain. Positioned for Pentagon contracts. One of very few credible alternatives to Chinese FPV hardware at scale.
strategic_significance.nato_relevance: Croatia pursuing EU first-manufacturer status for mini combat drones. NATO has praised Orqa's systems. €1.86B EU SAFE mechanism loan planned for Croatian defense modernization.
strategic_significance.competition_vs_ukraine: Defense Express notes Orqa as serious competitor to Ukrainian FPV manufacturers. Ukraine produced 3M drones in 2025 — Orqa targets 1M globally with partner factories.
strategic_significance.us_market: Kovačević: Orqa is '100 percent' positioning for Pentagon contracts. US is 'front and center' for manufacturing localization.
strategic_significance.key_differentiator: Full vertical integration in EU/NATO country. No Chinese components. Manufacturing localization model for sovereign capability in partner nations.

risk_factors: 2025 Chinese module incident damaged DoD trust — any future component origin issues would be severe
2023 goggle bricking incident (third-party software) raised reliability concerns
280K/year capacity is still small vs Chinese manufacturers (Grepow: 1M+ batteries/day)
Series A funding ($12.7M) is modest compared to US defense drone startups (Anduril, Shield AI)
Proprietary digital FPV system not yet released — still relies on ImmersionRC Ghost + analog
